danger_scale.name: Low
danger_scale.travel_advice: Generally safe avalanche conditions. Watch for unstable snow on isolated terrain features.

danger_scale.name: Moderate
danger_scale.travel_advice: Heightened avalanche conditions on specific terrain features. Evaluate snow and terrain carefully; identify features of concern.

danger_scale.name: Considerable
danger_scale.travel_advice: Dangerous avalanche conditions. Careful snowpack evaluation, cautious route-finding and conservative decision-making essential.

danger_scale.name: High
danger_scale.travel_advice: Very dangerous avalanche conditions. Travel in avalanche terrain not recommended.

avalanche_problems.name: Dry Loose
avalanche_problems.description: Release of dry unconsolidated snow; point-release sluff

avalanche_problems.name: Storm Slab
avalanche_problems.description: Cohesive layer of new snow breaking within storm snow or at old snow interface

avalanche_problems.name: Wind Slab
avalanche_problems.description: Cohesive layer of wind-deposited snow; smooth, rounded, sometimes hollow-sounding

avalanche_problems.name: Persistent Slab
avalanche_problems.description: Cohesive layer over a persistent weak layer (surface hoar, depth hoar, facets)

avalanche_problems.name: Deep Persistent Slab
avalanche_problems.description: Thick hard slab over a deep persistent weak layer; very destructive, hard to trigger

avalanche_problems.name: Wet Loose
avalanche_problems.description: Release of wet unconsolidated snow or slush; common during warming

avalanche_problems.name: Wet Slab
avalanche_problems.description: Release of moist or wet cohesive slab; triggered by warming or rain-on-snow

avalanche_problems.name: Cornice Fall
avalanche_problems.description: Release of overhanging snow mass from a ridge; can trigger slab avalanches below

avalanche_problems.name: Glide Avalanche
avalanche_problems.description: Release of entire snow cover gliding over ground; preceded by glide cracks

elevation_bands.label: Above Treeline
elevation_bands.description: Alpine; open, exposed terrain with few or no trees

size_destructive.description: Could bury, injure, or kill a person
Could destroy a car or small building
Could destroy a railway car or large truck
Could gouge the landscape; largest known
